title: Pet Boarding/Sitting Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Pet Boarding/Sitting Services 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FERN'S PLACE PLACE A PET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary foster care for cats, dogs, and other animals. Services are based on availability and provided by volunteers. Eligibility: Individuals entering inpatient treatment: Medical or substance use disorder treatment Pets: Proof of vaccination Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details PET HELP FINDER PET RESOURCES LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Locator for veterinary services, pet food pantry, supplies, pet services such as boarding, co-housing shelters, pet care for seniors, transportation support, and behavioral help. Locator also lists grant programs, free and discounted services, and pop-up events such as vaccine clinics. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
